narrative:
Hopewell Twp township has 1,793 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.0 percentage points.
